subject: Upgrade VNFSDK to use common Postgres charts
commit_message:
Upgrade VNFSDK to use common Postgres charts

Issue-ID: OOM-1185

Change-Id: Ie011e87bc9322149076ec62cab3a8b3315e1d817
Signed-off-by: jasmineWen <jasmine.wen@amdocs.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/185/

Patch Set 1:

adjust override parameters,  now the volumeMount permission issue is gone, 2 postgres instances running fine: 

onap          dev-vnfsdk-7fbcbc597f-9hg5p                     1/1       Running            0          1m
onap          dev-vnfsdk-postgres-0                           1/1       Running            0          1m
onap          dev-vnfsdk-postgres-1                           1/1       Running            0          1m

Patch Set 3:

Hi Chris,  

/service/logs/catalina.out shows:  
06-Sep-2018 20:08:44.037 SEVERE [http-nio-8702-exec-2] org.postgresql.Driver.connect Connection error:
 org.postgresql.util.PSQLException: FATAL: database "marketplaceDB" does not exist

The DB initialization script is missing when using common DB chart. Would you provide initialization script? 

Thanks, 
Jasmine

Patch Set 3:

@jasmine, pls find the details here:

Schema initializer:
------------------
https://github.com/onap/vnfsdk-refrepo/blob/master/vnfmarket-be/deployment/docker/docker-postgres/src/main/docker/marketplace_tables_postgres.sql

currently VNFSDK set the default credentials here https://github.com/onap/vnfsdk-refrepo/blob/master/vnfmarket-be/deployment/docker/docker-postgres/src/main/docker/Dockerfile .

what is the default credentials used in OOM for postgres ?

Thank you.

Patch Set 3:

Thank you Kanagaraj! 
I'll take a look at running initialization script from helm chart. 
the credentials set in kubernetes/vnfsdk/values.yaml: 
    pgUserName: postgres
    pgDatabase: postgres
    pgPrimaryPassword: postgres
    pgUserPassword: postgres
    pgRootPassword: postgres

Patch Set 3:

Thanks Jasmine
